blockers: GKG CLI is missing from PATH and the GKG server is not reachable/indexed; GitNexus CLI and direct source inspection were used.
GitNexus detect_changes is unavailable in the installed CLI surface; gitnexus status and git diff checks were used.
Global git diff --check passes cleanly after artifact normalization.
W-01, W-02, and W-03 are closed with verification evidence; release-owner sign-off is still needed for remaining P1/P2 product and safety backlog before an unconstrained Production Ready claim.
summary: Completed the P1 UI truthfulness and destructive-confirmation slice after waiver closure. Public/news/auth/support/pricing/dashboard/admin pagination actions no longer expose enabled fake hash links; unsupported actions are disabled honestly; local CSV export was added where data is already loaded; user/dept/room deactivate, slot block/delete, queue skip/complete, invoice void, inventory delete, and lab delete now have browser confirmation coverage. Playwright UI truthfulness manifest reports 0 fake/hash-link bugs, and the real-user Chrome browser pass completed 23 checks with 0 unfiltered console errors and 0 4xx/5xx app/API requests. Current verdict remains Release Candidate / Ship with fixes because product scope and clinical safety decisions remain.
next_action: Continue remaining P1/P2 backlog: patient self-service scope, support-ticket contracts, audit-log export/filter behavior, staff booking/vital-sign click-path validation, clinical locking/addendum policy, and drug/allergy interaction scope.
